ance Union will hold mass meet

Ladies play billiards and pool
every day and evening at Pfster
billiard parlor. ***


The General Transfers union,
No. 202, will give a smoker this
evening at 615 Main avenue.
Sheriff Doak and Prosecuting At
torney Barnhart are at Foothill to
day in attendance upon a justices
court on public business.
F. n. Muzzy drew down S. OF
county money this morning in re-
turn for five coyote scalps whose
owners were killed at Newman
Lake.


WANTED - Organizers for Mod
ern Woodmen of America, at once
don't lose any time. S. Wolff, dis
trict deputy, SO Howard street

The West Hillside chapter of the
First Presbyterian church will
meet Thursday afternoon at 2:3C
o'clock with Mrs. H. S. Kirkendall
SIPS Adams street.


NUTRITO, the Goth Century Ger.
cal coffee, is made by union men
Ask your grocer for it. Is and 25
cents per package. **'


The Typographical union hello
their regular monthly meeting last
Sunday, w. D. Wheaton was re
elected president and John Ander
son succeeded himself as secre
tary.


The Mystic Shriners gave a New
Years dance at the Masonic Tenn
pie last night, about 200 couples at
tending. The committee included
e. H. Hutchinson. potentate; H. A
Bronson and H. l.. Kimball.


Miss La Dell Edgar, of Missouls
is in the city visiting w. H. Fair
weather and family. Miss Edgar
lived in Spokane for some time
but moved to Montana about 6
year ago.
